statements.sql: select * from `news_posts` where (`title` LIKE '%dis%' or `details` LIKE '%dis%' or `description` LIKE '%dis%') limit 100

select * from `service_providers` where (`name` LIKE '%dis%' or `registration_number` LIKE '%dis%' or `brief_profile` LIKE '%dis%' or `physical_address` LIKE '%dis%' or `services_offered` LIKE '%dis%' or `districts_of_operation` LIKE '%dis%' or `target_group` LIKE '%dis%' or `disability_category` LIKE '%dis%' or `affiliated_organizations` LIKE '%dis%' or `mission` LIKE '%dis%' or `postal_address` LIKE '%dis%') limit 100

select * from `jobs` where (`title` LIKE '%dis%' or `description` LIKE '%dis%' or `location` LIKE '%dis%' or `type` LIKE '%dis%' or `minimum_academic_qualification` LIKE '%dis%' or `required_experience` LIKE '%dis%' or `how_to_apply` LIKE '%dis%' or `hiring_firm` LIKE '%dis%' or `deadline` LIKE '%dis%') limit 100
select * from `innovations` where (`title` LIKE '%dis%' or `innovation_type` LIKE '%dis%' or `innovators` LIKE '%dis%' or `innovation_status` LIKE '%dis%' or `description` LIKE '%dis%') limit 100
select * from `events` where (`title` LIKE '%dis%' or `theme` LIKE '%dis%' or `details` LIKE '%dis%' or `venue_name` LIKE '%dis%' or `address` LIKE '%dis%') limit 100
select * from `disabilities` where (`name` LIKE '%dis%' or `description` LIKE '%dis%') limit 100

select count(*) as aggregate from `resources` where (`title` LIKE '%dis%' or `type` LIKE '%dis%' or `other_type` LIKE '%dis%' or `date_of_publication` LIKE '%dis%' or `description` LIKE '%dis%' or `author` LIKE '%dis%')
